view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding token rotation requirements.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding token rotation requirements.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding token rotation requirements.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario related to token rotation requirements, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or results from the simulation. Without concrete traces or snapshots to confirm the behavior of the system in response to the token rotation requirements, it is impossible to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear failure report. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
